amount_or_product_check.name: amount_or_product_check
amount_or_product_check.value: "checkout"."product_id" IS NOT NULL OR "checkout"."amount" IS NOT NULL

asset_or_stringified_bank_account_check.name: asset_or_stringified_bank_account_check
asset_or_stringified_bank_account_check.value: "payout"."asset" IS NOT NULL OR "payout"."stringified_bank_account" IS NOT NULL

transaction_hash_or_withdrawal_receipt_u.name: transaction_hash_or_withdrawal_receipt_url_check
transaction_hash_or_withdrawal_receipt_u.value: "payout"."transaction_hash" IS NOT NULL OR "payout"."withdrawal_receipt_url" IS NOT NULL
